name: rls_policy_always_true
title: RLS Policy Always True
description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like \`USING (true)\` or \`WITH CHECK (true)\` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with \`USING (true)\` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
detail: Table `public.groups` has an RLS policy `groups_insert` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security for authenticated.

name: public_bucket_allows_listing
title: Public Bucket Allows Listing
description: Detects public storage buckets with a broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects`, which allows clients to list all files in the bucket.
detail: Public bucket `avatars` has 2 broad SELECT policies on `storage.objects` (avatars_select 1oj01fe_0, lore_photos_select 1lr8htk_0), allowing clients to list all files. Public buckets don't need this for object URL access and it may expose more data than intended.

name: public_bucket_allows_listing
title: Public Bucket Allows Listing
description: Detects public storage buckets with a broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects`, which allows clients to list all files in the bucket.
detail: Public bucket `lore-photos` has 2 broad SELECT policies on `storage.objects` (avatars_select 1oj01fe_0, lore_photos_select 1lr8htk_0), allowing clients to list all files. Public buckets don't need this for object URL access and it may expose more data than intended.

description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable by signed-in users. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if signed-in users should not call it.
detail: Function `public.get_tribunal_votes_for_event(p_event_id uuid)` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/get_tribunal_votes_for_event`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

name: auth_leaked_password_protection
title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.
